author: undefined
message:
**We are proud to announce that SPG Rivals Division has officially merged with FST | Gangster Clan Of Rivals.**

> Both clans have joined forces to become stronger, more competitive, and united under one banner.

> All SPG members are now welcomed into FST with open arms. Together, we will dominate the Rivals leaderboards and build an even greater community.

`Welcome to the family, SPG.`

-# - FST Leadership
